title: senecio pflanzii
intro: Senecio pflanzii, also known as the African geranium or Cape geranium, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Senecio pflanzii include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Senecio pflanzii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, although it is recommended to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
